title: Heteroplasmy Benchmark Dataset - mitochondrial DNA mixture model - MiSeq - U5-H1-M1-M2-M3-M4-M5 - FASTQ
author: Federica Fazzini
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
mtDNA mixture model of 2 mtDNA sequences belonging to haplogroups U5 and H1. Run on Illumina MiSeq with 3 different polymerases (Clontech, Herculase, NEB Taq), and different DNA extraction protocols - Paired-end Fastq files 

 M1 = Mixture 1:2 i.e. 50% 

 M2 = Mixture 1:10 i.e. 10% 

 M3 = Mixture 1:50 i.e. 2% 

 M4 = Mixture 1:100 i.e. 1% 

 M5 = Mixture 1:200 i.e. 0.5%
steps_raw:
